allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'], p['price']\) for p in d.get\('products',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'], '$'+str\(p['price']/100\)\) for p in d.get\('products',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Order:', d['order']['id'], '| Total:', d['order']['total'], '| Status:', d['order']['status']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(t\)} tests loaded. First: {t[0][\\"name\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d[\\"products\\"]\)} products in DB'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"sessions={d['totalSessions']} tests={d['totalTests']} alerts={d['activeAlerts']} rageClicks={d['rageClicks']}\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {x['name']} [{x['status']}]\\"\) for x in t]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {p['name']} \\${p['price']/100:.0f}\\"\) for p in d['products']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {s['id']} [{s['status']}] {s.get\('country','?'\)}\\"\) for s in d['sessions']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['id'], '-', p['name'], '-', p['price']\) for p in d['products']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['id'], '-', p['name'], '-', '\\$'+str\(p['price']/100\)\) for p in d['products']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d['status'], '| Duration:', d.get\('last_duration'\), 'ms'\); [print\(f'  Run {r[\\"status\\"]} in {r[\\"duration\\"]}ms - {r.get\(\\"error\\"\) or \\"ok\\"}'\) for r in d.get\('runs',[]\)[:3]]")
